issue.title: [artifact-retention-review] Artifact retention policy review overdue
issue.body:
## Artifact Retention Review Overdue

Artifact retention policy review has exceeded the configured max age.

- detectedAt: 2026-04-19T18:18:21.399Z
- summaryPath: reports/ae-framework-runs-summary.json
- policyPath: configs/artifact-retention/policy.json
- mode: keep_all_on_github
- preserveAllArtifacts: true
- lastReviewedAt: 2026-02-14
- reviewAgeDays: 64
- reviewMaxAgeDays: 30
- runCount: 96

### Required Action

1. Confirm current artifact retention strategy is still valid.
2. Update `configs/artifact-retention/policy.json` `review.lastReviewedAt`.
3. Commit the policy update and let autopilot regenerate reports.

### Tracking Key

- uniqueKey: [artifact-retention-review]
<!-- artifact-retention-review-key: [artifact-retention-review] -->
issue.closeComment:
Artifact retention policy review is no longer overdue.

- resolvedAt: 2026-04-19T18:18:21.399Z
- summaryPath: reports/ae-framework-runs-summary.json
Auto-closing this tracking issue.
